name: user-journey-map
description: Interactive progressive-extraction skill that produces a simple, structured user journey map (Pareto 3-col default, JTBD 5-col on demand) with explicit provenance marks, optional Mermaid diagrams, validation checklist, and hard PRD boundary. Ships 5 slash commands (create/validate/expand/mermaid/audit) and co-locates 2 specialized subagents (drafter + researcher) inside the skill.
author: hgflima
